message:
refactor(browser): lazy-load GPU singletons for deferred initialization

Convert eager singleton instantiation to lazy getter pattern:
- GPU modules: accelerator, aggregator, sorter, joiner, grouper, vector-search
- Cache: hot-tier-cache
- Export getters instead of pre-instantiated singletons
- Remove unused backward-compatibility aliases

Benefits:
- Faster initial bundle evaluation (no GPU init at load time)
- Better error handling (GPU init when actually needed)
- Reduced memory if GPU features never used
